_comment: Persistent seen-registry for the Arqel dogfooding loop. Keyed by a stable signature. A bug here is fixed (or confirmed-and-in-flight, or a deferred-feature non-bug); the loop must NOT re-file it. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-05-showcase-dogfood-ecosystem-design.md.

seen.note: refuted: documented duck-typed contract.
minimal coherent round-trip shipped; full signed-URL/Export-model/queue is DEFERRED feature work EXPORT-007/008 per ExportAction docblock — do NOT re-file the deferred surface as a bug.
the Round-1 residual; #78 routed bulk through the confirm-aware ActionButton + updated showcase E2E to confirm the dialog.
empty-transitions=free-form contract preserved; enforcement only when transitions declared.
refuted: acceptedFileTypes() is contracted to take MIME types not extensions; mimetypes: rule is correct. Passing extensions violates the documented contract.

refuted: arqel-dev/nav NavigationItem/BreadcrumbsBuilder emit /{slug} without /admin, but the package is UNWIRED — the real Sidebar uses HandleArqelInertiaRequests::buildNavigation() which prepends the panel path. Dead/parallel code, no app-facing 404.

refuted: follows the established web+auth convention (sibling export ExportDownloadController has the identical pattern + an explicit SECURITY NOTE delegating authz to the consumer app). Gap = audit lacks that delegation docblock — a doc/hardening note, not a behavioral bug.
refuted: documented anti-pattern in SKILL.md (override é obrigatório); ['*'] fallback is canonical intended behavior; no baseline model uses $guarded=[]+trait.
refuted: explicitly DEFERRED to CORE-006 (unchecked ticket box in PLANNING/08, documented workaround Rule::unique()->ignore). Same category as EXPORT-007/008.
exposed by the #103 fix (controller got findBySlug, authorizer didn't)
BLOCKER — generator output fataled on autoload (extends final)
parallel to #118 sidebar; shared ResourceAuthorization::viewAnyDenied helper
completes #81 for identifier_column != PK
refuted: structurally impossible (embed returns raw vector, no token/cost data); spec-conformant; documented deliberate; closing it = a public-contract-changing enhancement.
exclude-safe; full JOIN deferred to TABLE-005
per-handler McpDispatchException::invalidParams; widened to 5 handlers
security: stored CSS injection via } breakout; per-slot allowlist
data leak: full related-model JSON in export cell
completed #139 dead-guard sweep (missed controller)
doc inaccuracy — ::make() documented but no field has it
investigation found arqel.actions.* routes are dead (frontend uses core dispatch); removed them (vs wiring a 2nd auth-divergent surface)

reverses the R5 app-misuse verdict on audit::activity-log-no-tenant-scope-no-authz: the global activity-log + per-record activity read endpoints had web,auth only and ZERO controller authz (any authed user reads the full audit log + any record's activity). Gated like versioning history (Gate::has||getPolicyFor, deny when set; scaffold no-policy still allows).
Column::canSee()/Filter::canSee() per-record predicates had zero callers; serializeRecord now redacts non-visible cells + applyFilters skips non-visible filters; Table.php docblock corrected.

HIGH data-corruption: writeVersion snapshotted RAW getAttributes() so a cast attr (array/json/encrypted) was stored as a JSON string; restoreToVersion forceFill+save double-encoded it permanently; updating diff mixed cast getOriginal vs raw getDirty (type-asymmetric). Now cast-aware: per-key getAttribute snapshot, setAttribute-loop restore (re-applies casts, keeps mass-assign bypass), cast values on both diff sides. Casted fixture added.

NavigationCommandProvider hardcoded url '/admin/'.slug; now resolves the panel path (PanelRegistry getPath ?? config('arqel.path')) like InertiaDataBuilder::resolvePanelPath, resolved once in provide(). 404 on non-default Panel::path().

SelectFilter::multiple() serialized multiple:true but DashboardFilters.tsx SelectControl ignored it (always single-select); now branches on filter.multiple -> <select multiple> with array value/onChange mirroring TableFilters MultiSelectFilter. value path is unknown-typed end-to-end so array plumbs transparently.

LOW/latent (needs enforceMorphMap): RecordActivityController required class_exists(subjectType) (alias 'post' -> 400) and queried raw FQCN (storage holds alias -> 0 rows). Now resolveModelClass accepts FQCN or alias (Relation::getMorphedModel) and queries getMorphClass(); composes with the #181/#184 view-policy authz on the resolved class.

LOW/latent (needs non-users guard, fails-closed): Forgot/ResetPassword called Password::broker() no-arg (always 'users'); Panel::passwordResetExpirationMinutes + RegisterRequest also hardcoded users. Added resolvePasswordBroker() (guard->provider->broker, fallback users) in ResolvesPanelGuard + mirrored in Panel; all 3 touch-points now panel-guard-aware. Default web/users is a no-op.

next layer of #115: extractRules() called effectiveFields() with NO record, so validation rules evaluated layout visibleIf/canSee against null -> a required field hidden by a record-dependent Section for THIS record was still validated required (422, unsubmittable update). Now validated()/extractRules() thread the record (update=record, create=null) -> effectiveFields($record). Render + write-prune were already record-aware.

exposed by #189: WidgetRenderer.withFilters() did String(value) on object/array filter values on deferred/poll refetch -> {from,to}='[object Object]', ['a','b']='a,b'. Now recursive appendFilterValue: arrays -> filters[k][], objects -> filters[k][subKey], scalars unchanged, empties skipped. Matches the SSR qs bracket notation.

HIGH documented-but-unwired (CORE-006 shipped incomplete): BelongsToInput.tsx is async-only on f.props.searchRoute but NO producer set it -> picker permanently empty, belongsTo never selectable. Fix: FieldSchemaSerializer::serialize gained ?resourceSlug, injects searchRoute=route('arqel.fields.search',[resource,field]) for searchable BelongsTo. preloadedOptions/createRoute still follow-up (component doesn't read them yet).

same CORE-006 root cause: SelectField::resolveOptions() returned [] for relationship mode -> empty <select>. Fix: SelectField::resolveOptionsForOwner(Model) plucks display=>key via the relation; FieldSchemaSerializer::serialize gained ?Model owner ($record on edit/show, fresh model on create), injects into props.options. SelectFieldTest broken-[] assertion updated.

AiGenerate/Classify/Translate controllers didn't catch AiException -> 500 (Extract/AnalyzeImage returned 422). Added try/catch(AiException)->422 to all 3. SUPERSEDED by the #211 security hardening below.

Column getStateUsing/formatStateUsing/ComputedColumn were dead END-TO-END (verifier corrected scope from export-only): serializeRecord built rows from $record->toArray(), exporters used data_get -> computed cols blank, formatted cols raw, in BOTH table render and export. Fix: serializeRecord resolves $column->formatState($column->getState($record),$record) into the row (reusing the #182 column threading); export path resolves through the Column pipeline too.

SECURITY (info disclosure, automated review on the #205 commit): all 5 AI controllers returned $e->getMessage() for AiException, but OpenAi/OllamaProvider embed the raw upstream $response->body() in it. Fix: two-tier catch — DailyLimitExceeded|UserLimitExceeded keep their static user-facing message; bare AiException -> report($e) + generic 'AI provider request failed' (422). Closes the finding across the whole package, not just #205's 3.

HIGH, same family as #203/#204/#206 (documented API never wired at the serialization entry point, CORE-010 incomplete): HasForm::getFormSchemaArray() emitted only {name,type} so Action->form([SelectField->options(...)]) opened an EMPTY modal (FormRenderer dropped every field whose name wasn't in the empty formFields Map). Fix: Action::toArray() now ships formFields via core FieldSchemaSerializer (full schema); ActionButton/ActionMenu read action.formFields; form key stays {name,type} layout. actions->core dep already existed.

MED data-fidelity: CSV/XLSX/PdfExporter hardcoded ->format('Y-m-d') in every date branch (plain + the #206 state_resolver branch), ignoring DateColumn props.mode/props.format -> ->dateTime() dropped the time, custom ->date('d/m/Y') ignored. Fix: shared formatDateCell(value,column) honoring mode/format across all 3 exporters; plain no-props date still Y-m-d (no #106/#206 regression). PR #218 was accidentally closed by a premature --delete-branch; re-landed as #219.

HIGH, same documented-but-unwired family as #204/#206/#213 at NEW entry points: RepeaterField::getTypeSpecificProps()/Block::toArray()/Step::toArray() serialized nested sub-fields via method_exists($f,'toArray') which is ALWAYS false (no Field defines toArray) -> nested fields collapsed to {name,type}, dropping options/label/placeholder -> nested SelectField rendered empty. Fix: route all 3 (repeater+builder+wizard) through core FieldSchemaSerializer; Repeater/Builder/WizardInput.tsx read field.props?.options ?? field.options (canonical-first, flat fallback). Agent also swept WizardInput which had the identical defect.
